Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sign says, "Closed for termite[n]extermination. We will reopen on 4/25."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Sometimes you can find rare manga at good prices in places like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, looks like they're not open yet, so let's head over to Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
